history.description: a circle, breathing
history.tweet: L1: a circle, breathing.

history.description: a line, growing and rotating
history.tweet: L2: a line, learning to turn.

history.description: a triangle that follows you
history.tweet: L3: it knows you are there.

history.description: three shapes orbit, trailing afterimages
history.tweet: L4: they remember where they have been.

history.description: color wakes up. tap to multiply.
history.tweet: L5: color wakes up. tap to multiply.

history.description: citrus rings. tap to crack one open.
history.tweet: L6: crack one open.

history.description: bouncing citrus drops on cream. tap to fill the jar.
history.tweet: L7: fill the jar.

history.description: tap to place nodes. they connect. drag to reshape.
history.tweet: L8: they found each other.

history.description: energy pulses through the network. tap to surge.
history.tweet: L9: the network has a heartbeat.

history.description: every shape from L1-L9 together. the last sketch.
history.tweet: L10: reunion.

history.description: sixty creatures flock with simple rules. tap to scatter. hold to attract.
history.tweet: L11: they learned to move together.

history.description: tap to plant. branches fork and reach.
history.tweet: L12: tap anywhere. watch it reach.

history.description: liquid citrus. tap to drop. blobs pool, merge, ripple.
history.tweet: L13: they learned to flow.

history.description: tap to claim territory. seeds drift, regions shift, borders breathe.
history.tweet: L14: everything claims its space.

history.description: sound unlocked. 8 strings, pentatonic scale. tap to pluck, drag to bend. wave physics.
history.tweet: L15: they learned to sing.

history.description: drum machine. 4 voices, 8-step sequencer. tap pads to program. hit play.
history.tweet: L16: they learned to keep time.

history.description: tap to place notes. a playhead sweeps across, ringing each one. compose with your finger.
history.tweet: L17: tap to compose. the playhead remembers.

history.description: drag anywhere to play. x = pitch, y = volume. four voices. the screen is a theremin.
history.tweet: L18: drag to sing. the screen becomes an instrument.

history.description: tap to make a sound. it echoes off the walls, bouncing and shifting pitch. you hear the shape of the room.
history.tweet: L19: tap. listen to the room answer.

history.description: 700 particles follow an invisible field. tap to disturb the current. fabric-like flow, ambient drone.
history.tweet: L20: the current knows where to go. tap to bend it.

history.description: tap to place masses. they orbit each other. gravity pulls, trails trace orbits, collisions merge and blend.
history.tweet: L21: tap to add mass. watch them orbit.

history.description: chemical patterns grow from noise. drag to seed. double-tap to shift chemistry between coral, spots, maze.
history.tweet: L22: drag to seed. the chemistry decides the pattern.

history.description: a cloth of citrus threads. drag to pull. tear if you go too far. verlet physics, spring constraints.
history.tweet: L23: drag the cloth. pull to tear.

history.description: spinning arms at different harmonics draw a hidden curve. tap to add a frequency. double-tap to clear.
history.tweet: L24: every curve is just circles spinning at different speeds.

history.description: 15 pendulums of increasing length. they start in sync, drift into waves, then re-sync after 60 seconds. the last sketch.
history.tweet: L25: they drift apart. they always come back.

history.description: 320,000 points iterate one rule. no plan. the shape finds itself. tap to change the rule. seven clifford attractors.
history.tweet: L26: 320,000 points. one rule. they find the shape themselves.

history.description: three species. predators hunt prey. prey eat plants. plants grow. tap to intervene. balance finds itself or collapses.
history.tweet: L27: predators hunt. prey flee. plants grow. balance finds itself.

history.description: tap to seed. particles wander until they touch the crystal. chaos, one step at a time, becomes coral.
history.tweet: L28: every branch, chosen by accident.

feedback.reason: eggplant background looks like Windows 3.1. no blue/purple. warm darks only.
dark backgrounds are out. bright/light backgrounds from now on. SPRING.
